name: Sync KS Backers
description: Syncs a Kickstarter backer export CSV into nakamoto_knyt_personas. Matches by email — sets kickstarter_backed_at and advances campaign_state to 'backed' on existing rows; inserts new ks_backer prospect rows for new emails.

csv.description: Path to Kickstarter backer export CSV

apply.description: Write changes to Supabase (default: dry run)

skipped.description: Rows skipped (already backed or no email)

capabilities.name: Load CSV
capabilities.description: Parse Kickstarter backer export CSV, normalise column names

capabilities.name: Fetch Investors
capabilities.description: Paginated fetch of nakamoto_knyt_personas email index

capabilities.name: Match Backers
capabilities.description: Email-match CSV rows to existing investor records

capabilities.name: Update Backed State
capabilities.description: PATCH kickstarter_backed_at + campaign_state='backed' on matched rows

capabilities.name: Insert New Backers
capabilities.description: INSERT new prospect rows for emails not already in DB

steps.name: load_csv
steps.prompt: Load and parse the KS CSV; normalise column names to lowercase

steps.name: fetch_investors
steps.prompt: Paginated GET nakamoto_knyt_personas selecting id, Email, kickstarter_backed_at, campaign_state

steps.name: match_backers
steps.prompt: Build email→id lookup; classify each CSV row as match/new/skip

steps.name: preview
steps.prompt: Print counts: matched, new, skipped — prompt to run with --apply

steps.name: apply_updates
steps.prompt: PATCH matched rows; INSERT new prospect rows (only if --apply)
